# Heads & Tails Haulage — Excavator & Tipper Truck Hire, Adelaide Hills SA

> Dry hire (self-operate) equipment rental based in Crafers, South Australia, serving the Adelaide Hills: Stirling, Aldgate, Bridgewater, Hahndorf, Mount Barker, Blackwood, Belair, Mitcham and surrounds. Online booking with live availability at https://artrajeus.github.io/heads-tails-haulage/

## Equipment and pricing (AUD, inc GST)
- 2016 Kobelco 4.5 tonne excavator (standard buckets included): $220 half day (4 hrs), $310 full day, $1,240 per week. Attachments: auger +$60/day, hydraulic rock breaker +$120/day, both $150/day. No high-risk work licence is required to operate an excavator in South Australia; operators must be competent (RIIMPO320, VOC, or verified experience) and hold a white card for construction sites.
- 2015 Hino FD 500 tipper truck, automatic, 5.5 tonne payload (GVM 10,400 kg): $170 half day, $250 full day, $1,000 per week. Requires an Australian MR (Medium Rigid) licence or higher.
- Dig & Cart Combo (both machines): $495/day, $1,980/week — saves $65 per day.

## Booking terms
- Hire time is yard-to-yard from the Crafers yard. Half day = up to 4 hours; full day = one calendar day.
- 25% deposit online to confirm; balance before pickup; refundable bond $500 ($750 combo) pre-authorised at pickup.
- Cancellation: full refund 7+ days out; 50% between 2–7 days; deposit forfeited inside 48 hours.
- Return with a full diesel tank or refuelling charged at $3.30/L + $25.
- Delivery free within 15 km of Crafers on 2+ day hires; otherwise from $90 each way. Yard pickup free.
- Dry hire only (no operator). Wet hire quotes on request by email.

## Contact
- Email: headsandtails@gmail.com
- Phone: 0414 689 574
- Yard / pickup: 454 Mount Barker Road, Crafers West SA 5152
- Business: Heads and Tails Haulage Pty Ltd, ABN 36 657 016 496, ACN 657 016 496
- Terms: https://artrajeus.github.io/heads-tails-haulage/terms.html
